use_cases: Displaying individual products in e-commerce storefronts
Adding items to shopping carts and managing wishlists
Highlighting discounted products with sale badges
Providing dark mode compatible product presentation
Creating interactive product grids with hover animations
ai_summary: A responsive product card component with dark mode support, featuring wishlist heart toggle and add-to-cart functionality. Includes smooth hover animations with scale and shadow effects, image zoom on hover, and sale badge display. Clean flat design suitable for e-commerce platforms with theme switching capabilities.
